## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Dependency update

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] Tested on Raspberry Pi hardware (if camera/upload behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] `config.ini.example` and README updated (if config changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] No secrets or real credentials committed
